abilities.description: Exile up to four target cards from a single graveyard. Activate only as a sorcery.
abilities.target_prompt: Select up to four target cards from a single graveyard

triggers.description: When CARDNAME dies, you may pay {4}. If you do, discover 4. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 4 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)
